{"service":{"id":62,"name":"Whatsapp","synonyms":"Whatsapp Ватсап Ватсапп","external_id":"wa","slug":"whatsapp","seo_title":"Buy a Virtual Number for WhatsApp Verification | Grizzly SMS","seo_description":"Get a temporary phone number for WhatsApp from Grizzly SMS. Receive SMS online for WhatsApp verification using disposable numbers from India, the USA, the UK, and other countries worldwide.","seo_keywords":"","description":"

Creating or verifying an account on Whatsapp often requires providing a valid phone number. But what if you don’t want to use your personal one? A temporary phone number for Whatsapp OTP is the perfect solution. It helps you maintain privacy and avoid unwanted messages while still receiving the necessary verification codes.

By using a virtual phone number for Whatsapp, you can complete the registration quickly and securely — all without linking your real number.

Why choose a temporary phone number for Whatsapp OTP

Using a temporary phone number for Whatsapp OTP gives you the flexibility to access the platform instantly. You don’t have to wait for activation or worry about revealing personal details. Temporary numbers are provided by trusted online services, and they are ideal for quick verifications.

Advantages include:

  • Fast SMS code delivery
  • No need for real SIM cards
  • Can be used from any device
  • Ideal for creating multiple accounts
  • Full privacy and anonymity

Whether you're testing the app, managing multiple profiles, or just want to keep your phone number private, you can get a virtual number for Whatsapp in seconds.

How to Get a Virtual Number for Whatsapp

  • Go to Grizzly SMS
  • Sign up or log into your account
  • Choose Whatsapp from the list of available services
  • Select a country and number
  • Start using it for verification

The entire process takes just a few clicks, and there’s no need for physical SIM cards or contracts.

FAQ

Can I use a temp number for Whatsapp verification multiple times?
No, one number is intended for the verification of a single account. If you need to create multiple accounts, you must purchase a separate virtual number for each one.

How secure is it to verify a Whatsapp account with a virtual phone number?
It is much safer than using a standard SIM card, as registering with a virtual number allows you to remain completely anonymous.

Do I need to install any app to receive codes from Whatsapp?
No, you can receive all messages directly in your Grizzly SMS account dashboard.

How fast will I get the SMS with the OTP code?
Usually within seconds, as long as the service is live and your number is active.

Can I use the same number for other platforms?
Some numbers may work for multiple platforms, but it’s recommended to use one number per account for stability.

{"page":{"id":178,"nav_id":71,"lang_id":2,"title":"Get a Temporary Phone Number for WhatsApp","alias":"how-to-buy-virtual-number-for-whatsapp","description":"Get a temporary phone number for WhatsApp from Grizzly SMS. Receive SMS online for WhatsApp verification using disposable numbers from India, the USA, the UK, and other countries worldwide.","keywords":"","title_tag":"Buy a Virtual Number for WhatsApp Verification | Grizzly SMS","image_id":2324},"placeholders":{"content":[{"id":4921,"index":0,"block_id":1,"block_name":"HtmlBlock","full_block_name":"LuyaCmsFrontendBlocksHtmlBlock","is_container":false,"values":{"html":""},"cfgs":{"raw":null},"extras":[]},{"id":5635,"index":1,"block_id":27,"block_name":"CkEditorBlock","full_block_name":"SitisBlocksFrontendBlocksCkEditorBlock","is_container":false,"values":{"text":"

If you need a quick and secure way to register on WhatsApp without revealing your personal number, using a virtual phone number for WhatsApp is your best solution. If you want to create a second account or use the messenger anonymously, services such as Grizzly SMS offer reliable, fast and affordable options to do so.

Grizzly SMS allows users to receive SMS online for WhatsApp verification without needing a real SIM card. Grizzly SMS allows users to receive SMS online for WhatsApp verification without needing a real SIM card. This is a great option for those who need additional messenger accounts to promote their business: marketers, SMM specialists and others.

Why Use a Virtual Number for WhatsApp?

A disposable number for WhatsApp is perfect when you want to avoid spam or need one-time access. Here are some typical use cases:

  • Registering temporary WhatsApp accounts
  • Bypassing regional restrictions
  • Keeping your identity anonymous
  • Managing multiple WhatsApp business profiles
  • Creating accounts for testing or automation

These numbers are non-permanent and expire after use, which makes them safe and convenient.

Key Benefits of Using a Temp Number for WhatsApp Verification

When you get a temporary number for WhatsApp, you receive more than just access. You get many benefits:

  • No personal data required
  • No need for a SIM card or phone
  • Receive the verification code instantly
  • Access numbers from multiple countries
  • Affordable rates with pay-as-you-go pricing

With a temp number for OTP WhatsApp, you can complete the registration in a few seconds without the risks associated with sharing your real phone number.

How to Get a WhatsApp Verification Number Online

Using Grizzly SMS is simple. To get a virtual phone number for WhatsApp, follow these steps:

First, you need to buy a WhatsApp number.

  1. Create an account on the Grizzly Sms website. The user only needs to provide an email address. No other personal data is required.
  2. Top up your personal account balance. You can choose one of the proposed payment systems.
  3. Let's go to the store. Here you can get a foreign number for WhatsApp – India, USA, UK or another country.
  4. You need to find the appropriate option in the list or enter it yourself in a special field. Click on button.
  5. The number will appear in the "Received numbers" tab.

You can purchase any number of phones. The site does not set any restrictions, which is very convenient.

Let's proceed to the stage of registering an account directly in the messenger.

  1. Install the application or program. Immediately after accepting the terms of service, we will be asked to enter the phone. Specify the one that was purchased in the previous paragraph.
  2. The system notifies you about sending SMS. To receive it, go to the website Grizzly Sms. A notification will appear in your personal account. Open and copy the confirmation code.
  3. Insert the code into the WhatsApp application.

We have considered how to buy a virtual number for WhatsApp (India, USA, UK or another country). The process takes a minimum of time.

Popular Countries: USA, India, and UK Numbers for WhatsApp

If you're looking for region-specific solutions, Grizzly SMS offers phone numbers from major countries:

Temp US Number for WhatsApp

A temp US number for WhatsApp is ideal for users wanting access to American WhatsApp services or features. With a US virtual number for WhatsApp, you can:

  • Simulate an American identity
  • Access local-only features
  • Verify WhatsApp for US-based apps or services

Video Guide: How to Get a US WhatsApp Verification Number

Temporary Phone Number India for WhatsApp

Need an Indian messenger account?  Buy an Indian virtual number for WhatsApp to:

  • Register WhatsApp in India
  • Use local business tools
  • Access India-based WhatsApp promotions

Whether you need a temp number for WhatsApp Indian version or a one-time virtual number for WhatsApp India, you’re covered.

UK Virtual Numbers for WhatsApp

For those targeting Europe, you can also get a UK WhatsApp number. It’s helpful for:

  • Accessing services limited to the UK
  • Creating business or bulk messaging profiles
  • Receiving OTPs for UK-based WhatsApp accounts
 

Other Use Cases: Temporary and Disposable Numbers for Everyday WhatsApp Use

Using virtual numbers for WhatsApp verification is not only for testing or creating burner accounts. Here are more ways you can benefit:

  • Freelancers using separate WhatsApp accounts for clients
  • Businesses managing teams or marketing through WhatsApp
  • App developers simulating global user behavior

Grizzly SMS helps you buy virtual numbers for WhatsApp in over 100 countries with instant activation.

{"service":{"id":62,"name":"Whatsapp","synonyms":"Whatsapp Ватсап Ватсапп","external_id":"wa","slug":"whatsapp","seo_title":"Buy a Virtual Number for WhatsApp Verification | Grizzly SMS","seo_description":"Get a temporary phone number for WhatsApp from Grizzly SMS. Receive SMS online for WhatsApp verification using disposable numbers from India, the USA, the UK, and other countries worldwide.","seo_keywords":"","description":"

Creating or verifying an account on Whatsapp often requires providing a valid phone number. But what if you don’t want to use your personal one? A temporary phone number for Whatsapp OTP is the perfect solution. It helps you maintain privacy and avoid unwanted messages while still receiving the necessary verification codes.

By using a virtual phone number for Whatsapp, you can complete the registration quickly and securely — all without linking your real number.

Why choose a temporary phone number for Whatsapp OTP

Using a temporary phone number for Whatsapp OTP gives you the flexibility to access the platform instantly. You don’t have to wait for activation or worry about revealing personal details. Temporary numbers are provided by trusted online services, and they are ideal for quick verifications.

Advantages include:

  • Fast SMS code delivery
  • No need for real SIM cards
  • Can be used from any device
  • Ideal for creating multiple accounts
  • Full privacy and anonymity

Whether you're testing the app, managing multiple profiles, or just want to keep your phone number private, you can get a virtual number for Whatsapp in seconds.

How to Get a Virtual Number for Whatsapp

  • Go to Grizzly SMS
  • Sign up or log into your account
  • Choose Whatsapp from the list of available services
  • Select a country and number
  • Start using it for verification

The entire process takes just a few clicks, and there’s no need for physical SIM cards or contracts.

FAQ

Can I use a temp number for Whatsapp verification multiple times?
No, one number is intended for the verification of a single account. If you need to create multiple accounts, you must purchase a separate virtual number for each one.

How secure is it to verify a Whatsapp account with a virtual phone number?
It is much safer than using a standard SIM card, as registering with a virtual number allows you to remain completely anonymous.

Do I need to install any app to receive codes from Whatsapp?
No, you can receive all messages directly in your Grizzly SMS account dashboard.

How fast will I get the SMS with the OTP code?
Usually within seconds, as long as the service is live and your number is active.

Can I use the same number for other platforms?
Some numbers may work for multiple platforms, but it’s recommended to use one number per account for stability.
